[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An abstract red-tinted background with decorative overlay text and a circular profile-style icon in the center.

Main Subject:
In the middle of the image is a circular icon with a light gray fill and a smaller white circle in the upper portion and a larger white curved shape in the lower portion, outlined by a red border. Below the icon, large red text reads “SELAMAT JALAN,” followed by smaller white text reading “Sampai Jumpa Kembali.” Another line of smaller white text reads “Kayz x Hutoa II Assisten [3].” Near the bottom center, a pill-shaped red button-like element contains the text “19 Left” in white.

Setting:
The background appears to be an illustrated or abstract scene with dark red tones, faint shapes resembling flowers or leaves, and scattered light circles. The image looks like a digital graphic or promotional screen with a translucent red overlay.

Visual Details:
The overall color palette is dominated by red and dark maroon, with bright red used for the main title and button text, and white used for secondary lines. The background contains layered, semi-transparent shapes and patterns, while the central elements are crisp and centered. The camera view is flat and centered, with the text aligned horizontally in the middle of the composition.

Visible Text:
SELAMAT JALAN
Sampai Jumpa Kembali
Kayz x Hutoa II Assisten [3]
19 Left

Practical Summary:
The image shows a red themed graphic with a central circular icon and multiple lines of text. It also includes a red pill-shaped element indicating “19 Left.”
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
